name: Steamed Raspberry Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease and flour two 2-quart molds with tight covers.
2. Sift together flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt on a piece of waxed paper.
3. In a mixing bowl, beat sugar, butter, egg, and milk. Stir in the sifted flour mixture; beat until smooth. Stir in raspberries. Pour into molds. Cover.
4. Place molds in a large saucepan. Add boiling water to the saucepan so it comes halfway up the sides of the molds. Cover the saucepan; steam for 1 hour.
